name: Maylay Shield
description: The Maylay Shield is built for melee play. When its capacity is broken, it boosts your melee damage, encouraging aggressive close-quarters fighting instead of staying behind a fully charged shield.
notes: To get the most from it, you will often keep the shield down on purpose, so plan around healing, damage reduction, or other ways to stay alive while taking hits.

special.description: While depleted, it provides a large melee damage increase, but typically comes with a longer recharge delay, leaving you exposed for longer.
